name: moim
description: Moim 모노레포 루트 — backend + frontend 통합 실행

scripts.dev: echo Moim dev  -  frontend http://localhost:3000  -  backend http://localhost:4000 && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
